name: Madoc's Household
quote: "He raised me to be a warrior, but he also taught me how to betray."
description: The residence of Grand General Madoc, where Jude, Taryn, and Vivienne were raised. A household where weapons are toys and war is family business.
history: After murdering Jude's parents, General Madoc brought the mortal twins and their half-fae sister here to Hollow Hall's residential household. Here, they learned swordsmanship and court protocol, forever living as mortal targets in a lethal world.
events: General Madoc's training duels with Jude Duarte in the courtyard.
The arrival of Prince Balekin for secret war deliberations.
Taryn and Jude's preparation for their presentation to the High King.
secrets: Madoc keeps his private letters to Prince Balekin locked in the desk's secret compartment.
Jude hid a stash of stolen poisons under the loose floorboard in her bedroom.
The family dining room has a secret exit leading to the stables.
